title: Israel's strike kills 12 medical workers at Lebanon clinic amid escalating Middle East conflict
summary_full: An Israeli strike in southern Lebanon killed 12 medical workers at a healthcare center. Another strike killed two paramedics. Lebanon is drawn deeper into the regional conflict. Israel warned of increasing consequences for Lebanon if Hezbollah continues its actions. Hezbollah stated it is ready for a prolonged conflict. Lebanese President offered to negotiate directly with Israel.
